# AvökatFinder Germany
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Germany for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Germany
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Germany
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Germany legal terms
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Germany
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Germany
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/baugenehmigung/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/eigenbedarfskuendigung/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/energieausweis/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/erbschaftsteuer/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/gewerbeanmeldung/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/grundbuch/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/grunderwerbsteuer/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/grundschuld/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kaufvertrag/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/maklercourtage/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/mietvertrag/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/nebenkostenabrechnung/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/notarkosten/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/steueridentifikationsnummer/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/weg-wohnungseigentumsgesetz/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/erbschein/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/gmbh/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/handelsregister/
- https://germany.avokatfinder.com/glossary/sozialversicherung/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Germany
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, interactive cost calculators, bilingual legal templates, decision guides, expat legal resources
- Last updated: 2026-05-01
- Sitemap: https://germany.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml
